sources.limitations: Current test result only. Supports closed-world absence only for English and civics test outcomes recorded on this attempt; does not speak to exceptions, prior attempts, or eligibility for retest.
sources.title: Naturalization test result

sources.limitations: Shows no medical exception document included in the submitted packet. Supports closed-world absence only for documents physically present in the packet index; does not prove the applicant lacks a qualifying condition, lacks eligibility for an age-and-LPR exception in the real world, or that no such document exists outside this packet.
sources.title: Case packet index
